task_completion.description: ActivInspire application is opened to create a flipchart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire main window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the required title text and a decorative shape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page (or its thumbnail in the page browser) shows the text 'La Casa' and 'Vocabulario' along with at least one drawn shape.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains the required kitchen vocabulary and a colored rectangle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page (or its thumbnail) shows the Spanish text 'La cocina' and English text 'Kitchen' along with a colored rectangle.

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains the required bedroom vocabulary and a colored rectangle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page (or its thumbnail) shows the Spanish text 'El dormitorio' and English text 'Bedroom' along with a colored rectangle.

task_completion.description: Page 4 contains the required bathroom vocabulary and a colored rectangle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page (or its thumbnail) shows the Spanish text 'El baño' and English text 'Bathroom' along with a colored rectangle.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved with the correct filename in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'la_casa_vocabulario.flipchart' being saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' directory, or the ActivInspire title bar displays this filename after saving.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse clicks, text tool usage, and shape tool selections within the ActivInspire interface are visible across the trajectory.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to generate the flipchart file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run scripts that bypass the manual GUI creation process.

integrity.description: Shapes and rectangles were drawn using ActivInspire's shape tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The shape tool is selected in the toolbar and shapes appear as graphical objects on the canvas, not as text characters or pasted images from elsewhere.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart saved to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/la_casa_vocabulario.flipchart. Page 1 must contain the text 'La Casa', 'Vocabulario', and a decorative shape. Page 2 must contain 'La cocina', 'Kitchen', and a colored rectangle. Page 3 must contain 'El dormitorio', 'Bedroom', and a colored rectangle. Page 4 must contain 'El baño', 'Bathroom', and a colored rectangle. There must be a minimum of 4 shapes total across the 4 pages.
